emails.body: Re: UA4 for Meter 8608 6/98 deal 96731 Stella, The deal is in Sitara (#11121). However, that point has been inactivated. In OSS, you can manually enter the contract you need to allocate the volumes. D From: Stella L Morris 12/16/99 06:09 PM
